name: Tax Whistleblower Anti-Retaliation Relief

eligibility.description: Available to employees, contractors, or agents who provide information regarding tax underpayment or violations to the IRS or other authorized government bodies.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employees who suffer retaliation for reporting tax fraud are entitled to 200% of back pay, 100% of lost benefits, and reimbursement for litigation costs and attorney fees.
